name: nexus-mcp
description: Two LLM security APIs: (1) jpi-guard detects prompt injection attacks specialized for Japanese RAG apps. (2) PII Guard scans Japanese text for 10 PII categories and masks them. Both are free to start — no credit card required.
author: nexlabo

skills.name: check-rag-security
skills.description: Run a prompt injection security scan on a RAG endpoint

skills.name: setup-jpi-guard
skills.description: Add jpi-guard security checks to the current RAG project

skills.name: scan-pii
skills.description: Scan text for Japanese PII (My Number, credit card, phone, name, etc.) and mask it
